rationale: The citing paper references Simonsohn (2011) mainly as an example that expert rankings can influence consumer behavior outside higher education. It appears in grouped/background citations (intro footnote and later discussion of empirical evidence) to motivate the general relevance of rankings. The 2019 paper does not build its formal model, assumptions, or derivations directly on Simonsohn's design or findings, nor does it extend or challenge that specific study.
